headline: Axon’s AI Push And 911 Acquisitions Reshape Public Safety Growth Story
summary: Axon Enterprise (NasdaqGS:AXON) is expanding its AI driven public safety platform with tools such as Draft One. The company is also moving deeper into emergency communications through acquisitions of Carbyne and Prepared. These steps signal a shift beyond Axon's core focus on law enforcement hardware and software. Axon Enterprise started out best known for Taser devices and body cameras, but today it is building a broader cloud and AI based public safety ecosystem. The launch of AI tools...

headline: Why Axon Enterprise (AXON) Is Up 9.5% After AI-Fueled Revenue Surge But Profit Collapse - And What's Next
summary: In late February 2026, Axon Enterprise reported fourth-quarter 2025 revenue of US$796.72 million, up from US$575.15 million a year earlier, while quarterly net income fell to US$2.75 million from US$135.18 million as earnings per share compressed sharply. Beyond the headline growth, Axon highlighted record bookings, rapid adoption of its AI-powered Draft One report-writing tool, and expanded software- and services-driven recurring revenue, underpinned by acquisitions such as Carbyne and...

headline: This Battlefield Protection Company Has Gone Nuclear. It’s an Obvious Buy.
summary: Cadre Holdings is a one-stop shop for law enforcement, federal agencies, and U.S. and international armed forces. Its move into nuclear safety makes its stock even more attractive.
